tasks.title: לדבר עם איגנסיו לגבי עיצוב הארונות
לבקש מאיסמאעיל אינווייס מסודר + רשיונות + ביטוחים לאימייל של אוניקס
איך מגיעים למחסן למעלה ? להתייעץ עם מושיקו
לדבר עם כל הקבלנים — לוודא שכולם סגורים ומוכנים ליום העבודה הראשון. לסדר לפי תאריכים.

scopes.title: Full Architectural Design
scopes.desc: Complete design from concept to blueprints

stages.name: Initial consultation
stages.desc: Meeting & site visit

stages.name: Concept design
stages.desc: Preliminary sketches

stages.name: Floor plans
stages.desc: Detailed floor layouts

stages.name: Blueprints & elevations
stages.desc: Final construction docs

scopes.title: Electrical — Panel Upgrade & Garage
scopes.desc: Full electrical scope: panel replacement, garage outlets & lighting. Includes permits, stucco/drywall patching.

stages.name: Panel Replacement
stages.desc: Remove main meter panel and sub panel. Replace with single 125A main meter panel board. Includes stucco patching.

stages.name: Permits
stages.desc: Pull electrical permits for panel upgrade

stages.name: Garage — 6 New Outlets
stages.desc: Install 6 new electrical outlets in garage. Includes drywall patching if needed.

stages.name: Garage — 8 Recessed Lights + Dimmer
stages.desc: Install 8 recessed lights with dimmer switch in garage. Includes drywall patching if needed.

stages.name: Final Inspection
stages.desc: City inspection & sign-off

scopes.title: Garage Epoxy — Champagne Flake System
scopes.desc: Full garage epoxy flooring with champagne flake system. Includes diamond grind, crack repair, epoxy base coat, flake broadcast, polyaspartic top coat.

stages.name: Diamond Grind
stages.desc: Full diamond grind of concrete surface

stages.name: Surface Repairs
stages.desc: Crack and minor surface repairs as needed

stages.name: Epoxy Base Coat
stages.desc: Application of 2-component epoxy base coat (includes moisture barrier)

stages.name: Champagne Flake Broadcast
stages.desc: Full broadcast of champagne flake + scrape and clean excess

stages.name: Polyaspartic Top Coat
stages.desc: Application of polyaspartic top coat for durability and UV protection

scopes.title: Black Gutters + Black Downspouts + Fascia Board Paint (Black)
scopes.desc:
Install gutters and downspouts, paint fascia boards. ALL BLACK.

GUTTERS:
• 500 linear feet of gutters — BLACK
• 6 downspouts — BLACK
• All hardware, hangers, end caps, corners included

FASCIA BOARD PAINTING:
• Paint up to 10 fascia boards — BLACK

PRICE: $2,250 all-inclusive (materials + labor)
MATERIALS: Supplied by contractor (Ignacio)
PAYMENT: Upon completion

stages.name: Gutter Installation
stages.desc: Install 500 LF gutters (BLACK) with hangers + end caps

stages.name: Downspout Installation
stages.desc: Install 6 downspouts (BLACK) with elbows + brackets

stages.name: Fascia Board Painting
stages.desc: Paint up to 10 fascia boards — BLACK

stages.name: Final Payment
stages.desc: $2,250 upon completion

scopes.title: Garage Cabinets — Custom MDF Shaker
scopes.desc:
Build and install custom garage storage cabinets per design rendering.

• 8 Shaker-style doors (4 upper + 4 lower), 2 rows × 4 columns
• MDF, painted white (matching interior doors)
• Overall: ~97"H × ~78¼"W × ~25⅝"D

3 Sections:
1. LEFT — Hanging rod + 4 shelves below
2. CENTER — Open area + divided shelves
3. RIGHT — Shelves + wine cooler niche (built-in)

Includes: fabrication, hardware (hinges/knobs), installation, paint finish.
Excludes: wine cooler unit, electrical.

stages.name: Deposit
stages.desc: $1,000 deposit paid via Zelle

stages.name: Fabrication
stages.desc: Build cabinet boxes + Shaker doors (MDF)

stages.name: Installation
stages.desc: Install and anchor to garage wall

stages.name: Finishing
stages.desc: Paint white + hardware install

stages.name: Final Payment
stages.desc: $2,000 remaining balance

scopes.title: פירוק גאראז׳ — הפיכה למשרד
scopes.desc: פירוק מלא של הגאראז׳ להכנה להסבה למשרד

stages.name: פירוק פלייווד (קירות ותקרה)
stages.desc: הסרת כל לוחות הפלייווד מהקירות והתקרה, כולל מסמרים וברגים

stages.name: פירוק ארונות ומדפים
stages.desc: פירוק כל הארונות, מדפים ואחסון קיים בגאראז׳

stages.name: פירוק מתקנים נוספים
stages.desc: הסרת hooks, מסילות, מתלים, וכל מתקן מחובר לקירות/תקרה

stages.name: ניקוי ופינוי פסולת
stages.desc: פינוי כל הפסולת, ניקוי הרצפה והכנת השטח לשלב הבא

scopes.notes:
יומיים עבודה, 2 עובדים (אונוריו + עובד שלו), $300 לכל אחד ליום.
סה"כ: $1,200
הגאראז׳ הופך למשרד.

scopes.title: Garage Attic Storage Loft — מחסן בתקרת הגאראז׳
scopes.desc: בניית עליית גג לאחסון בתקרת הגאראז׳. סגנון בוידם — אחסון קל בלבד, לא לעמידה. כולל שלד, ריצפה, וגישה.

stages.name: מדידות + תכנון לופט
stages.desc: מדידת שטח הגאראז׳ ותכנון מיקום הלופט לפי מבנה הגג הקיים

stages.name: התקנת קורת מרכז + עמודי תמיכה
stages.desc: Triple 2x12 center beam + 4x4 posts. מחלק את הספאן ל-~10ft לכל צד

stages.name: התקנת שלד (joists)
stages.desc: 34x 2x6x10 joists ב-16" OC + joist hangers + ledger boards לקירות

stages.name: הנחת ריצפת OSB
stages.desc: 14 לוחות 1/2" OSB 4x8 — מספיק לאחסון קל

stages.name: התקנת סולם מתקפל
stages.desc: Pull-down attic ladder 22"x54" — גישה לעליית הגג

stages.name: ניקוי ופינוי
stages.desc: ניקוי פסולת בנייה ופינוי שאריות חומרים

scopes.notes:
יומיים עבודה, 2 עובדים (אונוריו + עובד שלו), $300 לכל אחד ליום.
סה״כ: $1,200

חומרים (~$950-1,250):
- 34x 2x6x10 (joists)
- 3x 2x12x12 (center beam)
- 2x 4x4x8 (posts)
- 2x 2x6x12 (ledger)
- 14x 1/2" OSB 4x8
- 68x joist hangers LUS26
- Pull-down attic ladder
- Hardware (lag bolts, screws, nails)

סגנון בוידם — אחסון קל בלבד, לא לעמידה.

scopes.title: Garage Insulation — Walls + Ceiling (Partial)
scopes.desc:
Insulate 360 sqft garage for office conversion with AC.

WALLS:
• R-15 Unfaced fiberglass batts in all 2×4 stud cavities
• Vapor barrier (6 mil poly) on warm side
• Seal all penetrations (outlets, pipes)

CEILING (partial — around voids):
• R-30 Kraft faced batts between joists
• Insulation support wires to hold in place

INCLUDES: measure/cut, install batts, vapor barrier, foam seal gaps, cleanup
EXCLUDES: drywall, AC install, electrical, garage door insulation

stages.name: Prep & Measure
stages.desc: Measure all cavities, prep workspace

stages.name: Wall Insulation
stages.desc: Install R-15 batts in all wall stud cavities

stages.name: Ceiling Insulation
stages.desc: Install R-30 batts between joists (around voids)

stages.name: Vapor Barrier + Sealing
stages.desc: Poly sheeting + foam seal all gaps/penetrations

stages.name: Cleanup + Inspection
stages.desc: Remove debris, final check

scopes.title: MEP Final — AC Prep, Exhaust Fan, Recessed Lighting, Outlet
scopes.desc:
Complementary systems for 360 sqft garage→office conversion.

AC PREP:
• Install AC disconnect box (exterior)
• Run AC whip (liquid-tight conduit) from disconnect to unit location
• Electrical connection point for mini-split (line set not included)

VENTILATION:
• Install roof exhaust fan (70 CFM) with roof cap
• Run flex duct from fan to roof cap
• Wire to switch

LIGHTING:
• Install 8× LED recessed lights (6" canless)
• Wire to existing circuit (Robert's rough-in)
• Connect to switch

OUTLET:
• Install duplex outlet near garage door motor
• Old work box + 14/2 Romex run

INCLUDES: all wiring, boxes, connections, testing
EXCLUDES: AC unit, AC installation, line set, new breakers

stages.name: AC Disconnect + Whip
stages.desc: Mount disconnect box, run liquid-tight to AC location

stages.name: Exhaust Fan + Roof Cap
stages.desc: Cut roof opening, install fan + duct + cap

stages.name: Recessed Lights (×8)
stages.desc: Cut holes, install 8 LED canless lights, wire to switch

stages.name: Outlet by Motor
stages.desc: Old work box + outlet near garage door motor

stages.name: Testing + Cleanup
stages.desc: Test all circuits, cleanup

scopes.title: Interior Paint — Walls (Eggshell) + Ceiling (Flat), White
scopes.desc:
Paint 360 sqft garage interior after drywall.

PREP:
• Caulk all seams, corners, nail holes
• Sand rough spots
• Apply primer (1 coat) to all surfaces

WALLS:
• 2 coats Eggshell white (Behr Ultra)
• ~480 sqft wall area

CEILING:
• 2 coats Flat white ceiling paint
• ~360 sqft ceiling area

INCLUDES: prep, caulk, primer, 2 coats paint, cleanup
EXCLUDES: drywall repair, trim painting

stages.name: Prep — Caulk + Sand
stages.desc: Caulk seams/corners, fill nail holes, sand rough spots

stages.name: Prime — All Surfaces
stages.desc: 1 coat primer on walls + ceiling

stages.name: Paint Ceiling — Flat White
stages.desc: 2 coats flat white on ceiling (~360 sqft)

stages.name: Paint Walls — Eggshell White
stages.desc: 2 coats eggshell white on walls (~480 sqft)

stages.name: Touch-up + Cleanup
stages.desc: Final touch-ups, remove tape, cleanup

scopes.title: Horizontal Slat Fence — Cedar Slats + Wood Posts, Mahogany Stain
scopes.desc:
Build 30 LF horizontal slat fence per design reference photos.

STYLE: Horizontal wood slats with gaps, wood posts, mahogany/brown stain
HEIGHT: ~5 ft
LENGTH: 30 linear feet

STRUCTURE:
• 6 wood posts 4×4×8ft (pressure treated), set in concrete, every 6ft
• Post caps

SLATS:
• 1×6 cedar boards, horizontal, with ~¾" gaps
• ~9 rows per section × 5 sections = ~50 boards

FINISH:
• Semi-transparent mahogany stain (2 coats) — posts + slats

INCLUDES: post setting, concrete, framing, slat install, stain, cleanup
EXCLUDES: gate (unless specified), permits

stages.name: Layout + Post Holes
stages.desc: Mark post locations every 6ft, dig holes

stages.name: Set Posts in Concrete
stages.desc: Set 6 wood 4×4 posts in Quikrete, level and plumb

stages.name: Install Horizontal Slats
stages.desc: Attach 1×6 cedar boards horizontally with ¾" gaps, ~9 rows

stages.name: Stain + Paint
stages.desc: 2 coats mahogany stain on all wood (posts + slats)

stages.name: Cleanup
stages.desc: Final inspection, cleanup
